payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish that shows a circular light reflection near the upper-left; the door is mostly visible in the crop with a slight top-edge crop and no visible handle, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
attributes: mostly visible with slight top-edge crop
